name: Acorn Squash Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut uncooked squash in half and scoop out seeds into a collander under running water. Drain the seeds on a towel.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Place the seeds in a small bowl. Melt the margarine and pour it over the seeds, or mix solid margarine with your hands for smaller seeds.
4. Spread the seeds evenly on a cookie sheet.
5. Place the tray in the oven and cook for 10 minutes or until they begin to turn brown.
